headline: Why Costco's Financial Strength Could Outpace Retail Challenges
summary: COST holds $18.24B in liquid assets, keeps debt low and plans 28 new warehouses as membership fees climb 13.6%.

raw.headline: Why Costco's Financial Strength Could Outpace Retail Challenges
raw.summary: COST holds $18.24B in liquid assets, keeps debt low and plans 28 new warehouses as membership fees climb 13.6%.

headline: Dollar General bridges onsite, offsite retail media with new solution
summary: Brands will be able to activate and optimize offsite and onsite inventory within The Trade Desk for the first time through an integration supported by Kevel.

raw.headline: Dollar General bridges onsite, offsite retail media with new solution
